title: Mechanical Computation
body:
_A 1.20.1 modpack designed for automation, so you can spend less time mining and more time creating_

## Multiplayer
This modpack was designed with multiplayer in mind, playing with friends is probably the best way to experience it. I personally recommend playing in survival, as creative gets boring after an hour.

## Mods
Please add 
[https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core-(unofficial-fabric-port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core-(unofficial-fabric-port))

[https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port))
Do to authors License You have to download manually
